explanations.45: This function checks if a post has a specific tag, handling both simple string tags and object tags with a label property.
explanations.46: Tags might be stored as either plain strings or objects with properties, so we normalize them to compare against the target.
explanations.48: This function checks if a post shares any tags from a list of target tags we're looking for.
explanations.67: We sort by date instead of randomizing to avoid hydration mismatches—this ensures the server and client render the same posts in the same order.
explanations.91: If descriptions are enabled, pass the post as-is; otherwise, pass a copy of the post with the description set to null to hide it.
